keys.backupCreated: Sigurnosna kopija ključa kreirana i preuzeta ✓
keys.restored: Key backup restored ✓ Keys installed locally
keys.noBackup: No encrypted backup exists for this account
keys.missingPublicKey: Backup is missing a public key

keySetup.title: Postavite ključeve uređaja
keySetup.description: Ovaj uređaj još uvijek nema vaš privatni ključ. Uvezite sigurnosnu kopiju zaštićenu lozinkom ili generirajte novi par ključeva (od sada ćete moći čitati nove poruke).
keySetup.imported: Privatni ključ je uvezen na ovaj uređaj. Sada možete čitati stare poruke.
keySetup.enterPassword: Unesite lozinku za svoj račun kako bismo sigurno napravili sigurnosnu kopiju vaših ključeva.

encryptionRecovery.title: Upravljanje šifriranjem
encryptionRecovery.description: Napravite sigurnosnu kopiju, obnovite, otključajte ili resetirajte svoj ključ za šifriranje.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Ovaj preglednik trenutno ne može dešifrirati vaše šifrirane poruke. Obnovite, otključajte ili resetirajte svoj ključ da biste nastavili.
alert.lockedBody: Obnovite ili otključajte svoj ključ za šifriranje kako biste čitali šifrirane poruke na ovom uređaju.

unlockPasscode.label: Otključaj šifru (trenutni uređaj)
unlockPasscode.description: Koristi se za dešifriranje ključeva lokalno prije izvoza

backupPassword.label: Loзинka za sigurnosnu kopiju
backupPassword.description: Koristi se za šifriranje datoteke sa sigurnosnom kopijom

restoreBackupPassword.label: Lozinka za sigurnosnu kopiju
restoreBackupPassword.description: Loзинka koju ste kreirali prilikom pravljenja sigurnosne kopije vašeg ključa na iPhoneu

newLocalPasscode.label: Nova lokalna lozinka
newLocalPasscode.description: Zaštitite ključeve pohranjenih na ovom pregledniku

resetLocalPasscode.label: Novi lokalni šifrirani kod
resetLocalPasscode.description: Potrebno prije resetiranja kako bi novi ključ bio zaštićen na ovom uređaju

devicePasscode.label: Lozinka uređaja
devicePasscode.description: Unesite lozinku koja se koristi za zaštitu ključeva na ovom uređaju.

newDevicePasscode.label: New device passcode
newDevicePasscode.description: Kreirajte kod uređaja za zaštitu ključeva na ovom uređaju.

resetDevicePasscode.label: Novi kod uređaja
resetDevicePasscode.description: Kreirajte kod uređaja za novi ključ za šifriranje na ovom uređaju.

messages.backupCreated: Ključni backup je kreiran i preuzet.
messages.keyRestored: Ključ je vraćen iz sigurnosne kopije naloga.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Vraćanje ključa je nepotpuno ili neispravno za ovaj nalog
errors.noBackup: Ne postoji šifrirani backup za ovaj račun
errors.noServerPublicKey: Ovaj račun trenutno ne izlaže javni ključ servera
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Backup servera ne odgovara trenutnom ključu za šifriranje računa
errors.resetFailed: Nije moguće resetirati šifriranje. Molimo pokušajte ponovo.
errors.restoreFailed: Nije moguće obnoviti vaš ključ za šifriranje. Provjerite svoju sigurnosnu kopiju i lozinku.
errors.unlockFailed: Nije moguće otključati vaš ključ za šifriranje. Provjerite svoj kod za otključavanje i pokušajte ponovo.

confirm.reset:
Resetirati šifriranje za ovaj račun?

Starije šifrirane poruke mogu postati nečitljive ako ne obnovite izvorni ključ kasnije.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Ovo generiše novi ključ za šifriranje za vaš nalog. Starije šifrirane poruke mogu postati nečitljive ako ne vratite originalni ključ kasnije.

danger.title: Pokreni novo šifriranje
danger.body: Ovo kreira novi ključ za šifriranje. Starije šifrirane poruke mogu postati nečitljive ako ne vratite originalni ključ kasnije.

encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Koristite lozinku uređaja ili obnovite sigurnosnu kopiju da biste otključali šifrirane poruke.
encryptionRecovery.restoreDescription: Obnovite ključ za šifriranje chata iz sigurnosne kopije zaštićene vašom lozinkom za sigurnosnu kopiju.

smsConsent.label: Slažem se da primam SMS obavijesti i upozorenja od {{companyName}}. Frekvencija poruka može varirati. Mogu se primjenjivati naknade za poruke i podatke. Pošaljite odgovor <stop>STOP</stop> da se u bilo kojem trenutku odjavite. Pošaljite odgovor <help>HELP</help> za pomoć.

phoneField.label: Telefon
phoneField.hint: Uključite šifru zemlje ako je potrebno (npr. +1 415…)

auth.headline: Sigurna poruka za svakoga, bilo gdje
auth.description: Šifriranje od kraja do kraja, prevođenje na više od 100 jezika, poruke koje nestaju i glasovni/video pozivi.

feature.encryption: Šifriranje od kraja do kraja kao zadano
feature.disappearing: Nestajuće poruke i potvrde o čitanju
feature.privacy: Privatnost na prvom mjestu. Vaši podaci, vaša kontrola.

hero.line1: Sigurna razmjena poruka za svakoga, bilo gdje — s
hero.sub: Dobijte besplatan siguran telefonski broj za pozive i poruke širom svijeta putem Wi-Fi veze ili podataka. Uživajte u enkripciji od kraja do kraja, porukama koje nestaju i HD glasovnim/video pozivima — uz ugrađene alate koji vam pomažu da ostanete povezani preko granica.
hero.freeNote: Osnovni pozivi i poruke su besplatni. Napredna AI i premium funkcije zahtijevaju nadogradnju.

feat.encryption: Enkripcija od kraja do kraja, uvijek uključena
feat.translate: Prelazite jezičke barijere u svojim razgovorima
feat.disappear: Poruke koje nestaju i potvrde o čitanju
feat.privacy: Privatnost na prvom mjestu. Vaši podaci, vaša kontrola.

auth.desktopTip: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.
auth.scanHelper: Na računaru? Skenirajte telefonom da preuzmete aplikaciju.
auth.subhead: Privatne, šifrirane i prevedene poruke — odmah.
auth.tip: Savjet: Koristite isti račun na webu i mobilnom uređaju. Vaše poruke ostaju sinhronizirane.
auth.scanHint: Skenirajte da preuzmete aplikaciju ili je otvorite u svom pregledniku.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum 6 znakova. Koristite jaku, jedinstvenu lozinku.
registration.smsConsent: Kreiranjem naloga pristajete da primate SMS obavještenja vezana za vašu aktivnost na Chatforiji (kao što su poruke od drugih korisnika). Mogu se primijeniti tarife za poruke i podatke. Možete se odjaviti u bilo kojem trenutku u Postavkama.
registration.phoneHelp: Koristi se za verifikaciju, sigurnost i SMS funkcije gdje je podržano.
registration.title: Kreirajte svoj Chatforia račun

auth.addRecipient: Dodajte primaoca iznad da biste počeli…
auth.oneRecipient: Molimo unesite jednog primaoca za sada.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Unesite ime sačuvanog kontakta ili broj telefona.
auth.sendFailed: Slanje nije uspjelo. Provjerite konzolu za detalje.

errors.emailTaken: Ta adresa e-pošte je već u upotrebi.
errors.invalidInput: Molimo provjerite svoje podatke i pokušajte ponovo.
errors.smsConsent: Kreiranjem naloga pristajete da primate SMS obavještenja vezana za vašu aktivnost na Chatforiji (kao što su poruke od drugih korisnika). Mogu se primijeniti tarife za poruke i podatke. Možete se odjaviti u bilo kojem trenutku u Postavkama.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.usernameOrEmailTaken: That username or email is already taken.
errors.usernameTaken: To korisničko ime je već zauzeto.

login.title: Nastavi na Chatforia
login.subtitleReturning: Prijavite se na svoj Chatforia račun
login.ssoUnavailable: Jednokratna prijava trenutno nije dostupna. Umjesto toga upotrijebite korisničko ime i lozinku.

verification.sent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

error.unprocessable: Neispravan zahtjev. Provjerite korisničko ime/e-poštu i lozinku.
error.deviceLimit: Dosegli ste ograničenje uređaja za besplatni plan. Odjavite se s drugog uređaja ili nadogradite na Premium plan da biste povezali više uređaja.

forgotPassword.title: Zaboravili ste lozinku
forgotPassword.helper: Unesite e-mail adresu koju ste koristili za kreiranje svog Chatforia računa i poslat ćemo vam siguran link za resetovanje lozinke.
forgotPassword.genericError: Ne može se obraditi zahtjev. Molimo pokušajte ponovo za trenutak.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Ako postoji račun s tom e-mail adresom, poslali smo link za resetiranje lozinke. Može potrajati nekoliko minuta da stigne. Obavezno provjerite mapu neželjene pošte ili promocija.

resetPassword.title: Resetiraj lozinku
resetPassword.missingToken: Neispravan ili nedostaje token za resetiranje lozinke.
resetPassword.missingTokenHelper: Neispravan ili nedostaje token. Molimo zatražite novu poveznicu za resetiranje lozinke.
resetPassword.genericError: Greška: Ne može se resetirati lozinka.
resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Odaberite jaku lozinku koju ne koristite na drugim mjestima.

home.title: Početna
home.messagesSubtitle: Unesite primaoca iznad, a zatim pošaljite poruku da započnete razgovor.
home.mixedRecipients: Detektovani su mješoviti primaoci. Koristite ili sve brojeve telefona (SMS) ili sva korisnička imena (Chatforia).
home.addRecipient: Dodajte primaoca iznad da biste počeli…
home.needNumber: Potreban vam je Chatforia broj prije slanja SMS-a.
home.enterValidRecipient: Unesite ime sačuvanog kontakta, korisničko ime ili broj telefona.
home.sendFailed: Slanje nije uspjelo. Molimo pokušajte ponovo.

chat.unlockToView: Otključajte svoj ključ da biste vidjeli ovu poruku
chat.clearConfirm: Obrišete li ovaj razgovor? To se ne može poništiti.

startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Type a name, username, phone, or email…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Pretraži po korisničkom imenu ili broju telefona
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Upiši korisničko ime ili broj telefona i pritisni Pretraži.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Unosi telefona/imejla bit će dostupni nakon što ih sačuvate kao kontakte.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Neuspjelo pokretanje chata sa odabranim primaocima.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Search saved contacts by alias, name, username, or phone
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Manage your contacts and invite friends.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Share your invite link to start chatting instantly.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Stay in touch on the go with Chatforia for iOS and Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Your messages stay synced across web and mobile.

profile.title: Profil korisnika
profile.mustLogin: You must sign in to view the settings.
profile.noPrivateKey: Na ovom uređaju ne postoji privatni ključ za izvoz.
profile.setBackupPassword: Postavite lozinku za šifriranje vaše sigurnosne kopije:
profile.enterBackupPassword: Unesite lozinku za ovu sigurnosnu kopiju:
profile.importSuccess: Privatni ključ je uvezen na ovaj uređaj.
profile.importFailed: Uvoz ključa nije uspio (pogrešna lozinka ili oštećena datoteka).
profile.keysRotated: Generiran je novi par ključeva i javni ključ je otpremljen.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Vaš privatni ključ nikada ne napušta ovaj uređaj. Izvezite zaštićenu kopiju lozinkom kako biste obnovili ga na drugom uređaju.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Na besplatnoj verziji—koristite brze opcije Sunce/Mjesec ispod. Nadogradite da biste otključali više tema.
profile.backupTitle: Šifrirane sigurnosne kopije i sinhronizacija uređaja
profile.backupDesc: Sačuvajte sigurnosnu kopiju vašeg ključa za šifriranje kako biste sigurno vratili svoje poruke na drugom uređaju.
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Zamućivanje kada aplikacija nije u fokusu
profile.freePlanCopy: Koristite besplatni plan. Nadogradite da biste otključali više funkcija kao što su sigurnosne kopije, dodatni brojevi, i napredne opcije privatnosti.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Nije moguće otvoriti naplatu. Molimo pokušajte ponovo.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Obavijesti me ako je moja poruka kopirana
profile.followHint: Njihove priče će se pojaviti u tvom feedu 'Oni koje pratiš' ako objave za publiku 'Pratitelji' (ili 'Javno').
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Nešto je pošlo po zlu u ovom odjeljku.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Preusmjerite dolazne pozive i poruke na vaš verificirani telefon ili e-mail. Odlazni pozivi/poruke mogu prikazati vaš Chatforia broj.
profile.errSmsDest: Odaberite barem jednu destinaciju (telefon ili e-mail).
profile.errQuietHours: Sati za tišinu moraju biti između 0 i 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Skladištimo samo dobni raspon (ne vaš tačan datum rođenja) . Ovo se koristi kako bi parovi u Nasumičnom chatu bili razumni.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Koristite uparivanje po godinama u Nasumičnom chatu
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Kada je uključeno, pokušavamo vas upariti s ljudima u kompatibilnim dobnim rasponima.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Tinejdžeri se uvijek povezuju samo s drugim tinejdžerima. Odrasli se ne mogu povezati s tinejdžerima.
profile.teenMatchingNote: For safety, accounts in the 13–17 age range can only be matched with other 13–17 accounts in Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Let Ria remember things you tell it
profile.foriaRememberDesc: When this is on, Foria can use your past Random Chat conversations (just with you) to keep the conversation flowing. You can turn this off any time.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Ostavite prazno da bi se sačuvala zauvijek
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: E-mail za slanje obavijesti o govornim porukama
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Koristi se kada vaša audio poruka nije dostupna.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Pozdravna poruka govorne pošte uspješno otpremljena
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Neuspjelo je učitavanje pozdravne poruke govorne pošte
profile.voicemailNote: Poruke govorne pošte s vaših Chatforia brojeva bit će pohranjene u vaš sandučić govorne pošte. Možete omogućiti transkripciju i prosljeđivanje u podržanim planovima.
profile.portHint: Želite zadržati svoj trenutni broj? Možete ga prenijeti u Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Profil korisnika
esim.desc: Dobijte mobilne podatke za Chatforia kada niste na Wi-Fi mreži.
esim.descActive: Vaša eSIM je aktivna i spremna za upravljanje.

sounds.freeNoticeStart: You’re on Free — premium tones are shown but locked.
sounds.freeNotice: You’re on Free — premium tones are shown but locked. Upgrade to unlock all.

aiSettings.title: Postavke AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Kontrolirajte prevođenje, pametne odgovore i automatske odgovore ForiaBota.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Send the last few received messages (sanitized) to AI to suggest quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: If on, suggestions returned by AI will have flagged words masked
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Omogući automatski odgovor kada sam zauzet

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options to make Chatforia easier to use without relying on sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase if you prefer larger text.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when a call rings.
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Show real-time captions from the other participant’s audio.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach a transcript to audio messages you receive.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration with notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on incoming call
Brief bright flash when a call rings.

privacySection.strictE2EE: Strogo šifriranje od kraja do kraja
privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Pohranjuje se samo šifrirani tekst na serveru. Onemogućava AI/Translate i preglede moderacije.
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: Omogućen strogi E2EE. AI/Translate će biti onemogućen.
privacySection.strictE2EEDisabled: Onemožen strogi E2EE. AI/Translate je ponovo omogućen.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Upravljajte svojim Chatforia mobilnim planom, brojevima, prosljeđivanjem i prenosom broja.

options.heading: Odaberite kako želite koristiti Chatforia
options.subheading: Možete dobiti novi Chatforia broj ili prenijeti svoj postojeći broj od drugog operatera.
options.portNumber: Prebacite svoj trenutni broj u Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Prebacite svoj postojeći broj
port.subheading: Prebacite svoj trenutni broj telefona sa vašeg postojećeg operatera u Chatforia. Pobrinite se da podaci tačno odgovaraju vašem korisničkom računu kod operatera kako biste izbjegli kašnjenja.
port.success: Zahtjev za prenos poslan! Obavještavat ćemo vas.

status.heading: Status prenosa
status.subheading: Track the status of your number port requests.

wireless.exhausted: Your data has run out. Buy a new pack to continue using mobile data.
wireless.dashboardIntro: Manage your Chatforia mobile data, phone number, eSIM setup, and plan status.

data.caption: Pratite trenutnu potrošnju podataka i preostali iznos.
data.familyCaption: Podijeljene podatke među članovima vaše porodice.

plan.title: Plan
plan.noneBody: Odaberite paket podataka da biste aktivirali Chatforia Mobile.
plan.noneBodyReady: Prvo postavite svoju eSIM, a zatim odaberite paket podataka kada budete spremni.
plan.familyBody: Ovaj plan je dio zajedničkog porodičnog paketa podataka.

esim.title: eSIM
esim.heading: Set up your eSIM
esim.subheading: Install your eSIM to use Chatforia Mobile data on this device.
esim.body: Generate or open your eSIM QR code and follow the activation instructions on your phone.
esim.readyBody: Your eSIM is ready. You can open the QR code or continue managing your mobile plan.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.errorReserve: Nije moguće rezervisati eSIM. Molimo pokušajte ponovo.
esim.iccidHint: ICCID jedinstveno identificira ovaj eSIM profil.
esim.secrecyNote: Ovaj QR kod čuvajte privatnim. Svako ko ima pristup može instalirati eSIM.

instructions.step1: Open your phone’s cellular or mobile data settings.
instructions.step2: Choose Add eSIM or Scan QR Code.
instructions.step3: Scan this QR code and follow the on-screen steps to finish activation.

phoneNumberManager.freeNumberHint: Besplatan broj koji se može reciklirati nakon neaktivnosti.
phoneNumberManager.premiumNumberHint: Sačuvajte svoj broj dok je vaša Premium pretplata aktivna.
phoneNumberManager.premiumProtectedHint: Premium brojevi su zaštićeni od ponovnog korištenja dok je vaša Premium pretplata aktivna.
phoneNumberManager.searchHint: Unesite trocifreni pozivni broj (samo za SAD/Kanadu), ili ostavite prazno, a zatim pretražite.
phoneNumberManager.premiumKeepFeature: Sačuvati vaš broj je Premium funkcija.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotAssign: Nije moguće dodijeliti taj broj. Možda je upravo zauzet—probajte drugi.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotLease: Nije moguće unajmiti taj broj. Možda je upravo zauzet—probajte drugi.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotProtectNow: Nije moguće zaštititi vaš broj trenutno.
phoneNumberManager.invalidAreaCode: Molimo unesite trocifreni pozivni broj (npr. 415) ili ostavite prazno.
phoneNumberManager.noInventoryAreaCode: Trenutno nema dostupnog inventara za taj pozivni broj.
phoneNumberManager.noFreeNumbersAreaCode: Trenutno nema slobodnih brojeva u našem fondu za taj pozivni broj.
phoneNumberManager.releaseConfirm: Oslobodite li svoj trenutni broj? Može biti dodijeljen nekome drugom.
phoneNumberManager.releaseWarning: Your number may be released in {{count}} day. Upgrade to Premium to keep it protected.
phoneNumberManager.pickNumberHint: Pick a Chatforia number to use for messaging and communication inside the app.
phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Unable to load phone number status.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Nije dodijeljen broj. Odaberite broj po područnom broju da biste počeli slati poruke.

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Start with our free, ad-supported plan. Go ad-free with Plus, or unlock full power features with Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Choose an app plan, add data packs for yourself, or share data with your family — all from one place.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Start with our free, ad-supported plan. Go ad-free with Plus, or unlock full power features with Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Add global eSIM data so Chatforia keeps working even when you’re away from Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Create a shared data pool for your family and manage everyone’s usage from one place.

public.premiumAnnual: Save 30% with annual – continue to login

free.title: Free
free.desc: Start messaging for free. Ideal if you’re just trying Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 and group chat, plus voice and video calls
features.media: Share photos, voice messages, and short videos
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies and instant translation (fair use)
features.disappearing: Disappearing messages and basic privacy controls
features.ads: Free forever with ads in the app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: All the essentials, without ads. Great for everyday messaging and calling.

features.allFree: Everything in Free, with no ads
features.forwarding: Forward calls and texts to your real phone number
features.support: Faster support when something goes wrong

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)
premiumMonthly.desc: The full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, and priority support.

features.themes: Unlock all premium color themes and app customizations
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools for rewrites, smart replies, and summaries
features.support: Priority support when you need help most
features.number: Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
premiumAnnual.desc: Save more when billed yearly — including extra color themes, AI tools, and priority support.

features.allPremium: Everything in Premium Monthly — including extra color themes
features.save25: Save around 30% compared to paying monthly
features.bestFor: Best for power users, remote workers, and heavy travelers

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, and AI power tools.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Billed upfront. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Add global data to keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based on your country and currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick a one-time global data pack so Chatforia keeps working when you’re traveling or away from Wi-Fi.

features.throttle: High-speed data subject to fair-use and network management policies

unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.
disclaimer.fairUse: High-speed data may be subject to fair-use limits, local network conditions, and regional availability.

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, and other apps on your phone).

hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.

mobile.choosePackSubtitle: Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.

feature.2: One-time data packs with clear pricing
feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable

region.localSubtitle: Best for staying connected in one country.
region.europeSubtitle: Great for trips across supported European countries.
region.globalSubtitle: Best for international travel across multiple regions.

small.title: Small pack
small.bestFor: Best for short trips and light messaging.

medium.title: Medium pack
medium.bestFor: Best for everyday messaging, maps, and light media.

large.title: Large pack
large.bestFor: Best for longer trips and heavier app use.

xl.title: XL pack
xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Share a single data pool across your family. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Includes 20 GB of shared high-speed data — great for 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of shared high-speed data — ideal for 3–5 active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Includes 80 GB of shared high-speed data — for power families that are always online.

feature.shared: Shared data pool for your family
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy and local limits

family.disclaimer: Family packs create or top up a shared data pool. You can invite and remove members anytime.
family.footnote: Family packs share a single data pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability and limits depend on your country and local regulations.

why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

free.q: Is the Free plan really free?
free.a: Yes. The Free plan includes a Chatforia number, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay on Free as long as you like, or upgrade to remove ads and unlock more features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your message history — perfect for everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority support for heavy users.

esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your country and device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app.

cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.

family.a: Family packs create a shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can invite or remove members and set limits per person.

randomChat.title: Slučajni chat
randomChat.subtitle: Trenutno upoznajte nekoga novog ili odaberite da razgovarate s Rijom.
randomChat.description: Prvo razgovarajte anonimno. Dodajte prijatelja kasnije ako vam odgovara.
randomChat.setAge: Postavite svoj raspon godina u Profilu → Godine i Slučajni chat kako biste se podudarali s ljudima.
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Koristnička imena ostaju skrivena dok obje osobe ne odaberu Dodaj prijatelja.
randomChat.riaSeparate: Razgovarajte s Rijom u bilo kojem trenutku — odvojeno od nasumičnog uparivanja s ljudima.
randomChat.saveGuard: Samo se mogu sačuvati razgovori između ljudi
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Samo pohranjujemo dobni raspon (ne vašu tačnu datum rođenja). Ovo se koristi kako bi parovi u Nasumičnom chatu bili razumni. Da biste se podudarali s ljudima (ne samo s RiaBot-om), postavite svoj dobni raspon u Postavke → Dob i Nasumični chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Postavite svoj dobni raspon u Profil → Dob i Nasumični chat kako biste se podudarali s ljudima.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Da biste se podudarali s ljudima (ne samo s RiaBot-om), postavite svoj dobni raspon u Postavke → Dob i Slučajni chat.

support.heading: How can we help?
support.contactIntro: We’ll try to resolve this instantly. If not, our team will follow up.
support.sent: Message sent. We’ll reply by email.
support.sendError: Could not send. Email support@chatforia.com instead.
support.actionFailed: Could not complete that action. Please try again.
support.ticketCreated: We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.escalationMessage: We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
support.resolvedInstantly: Issue resolved instantly — no ticket needed.

account.q: How do I create or recover my account?
account.a: Preuzmite aplikaciju ili koristite web, dodirnite "Kreiraj račun", potvrdite svoju e-poštu/telefon. Za oporavak, koristite "Zaboravili ste lozinku".

privacy.q: Jesu li poruke enkriptirane od kraja do kraja?
privacy.a: Da. Poruke i pozivi su enkriptirani od kraja do kraja prema zadanim postavkama. Samo vi i primalac ih možete čitati.

translate.a: Omogućite "Automatski prevod" u Postavke → Izgled i jezik. Prevodimo na uređaju gdje je podržano, inače putem sigurnih API-ja sa minimalnim metapodacima.

contact.a: Kontaktirajte nas na support@chatforia.com. Priložite snimke ekrana i vašu aplikaciju verziju.

gettingStarted.title: Početak rada
gettingStarted.subtitle: Novi ste na Chatforiji? Ovaj brzi početak prikazuje osnove kako biste mogli biti produktivni za nekoliko minuta.

alert.text: Ovaj vodič će rasti kako budemo pokretali nove funkcije. Ako nešto nedostaje, javite nam putem

section1.title: 1) Kreirajte svoj račun
section1.prefsStart: U aplikaciji otvorite Postavke da biste podesili svoje preferencije

section2.title: 2) Počnite slati poruke
section2.item1: Kreirajte DM ili grupu i pošaljite svoju prvu poruku.
section2.item2: Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages.
section2.item3: Isprobajte poruke koje nestaju i potvrde čitanja u Profilu → Privatnost.

section3.title: 3) Idite dalje
section3.item1: Možete nadograditi na plaćeni plan u bilo kojem trenutku unutar aplikacije.
section3.item2: Kada se prijavite, možete povezati dodatne uređaje i postaviti šifrirane sigurnosne kopije iz postavki u aplikaciji.
section3.item2Part1: Kada se prijavite, možete povezati dodatne uređaje i postaviti šifrirane sigurnosne kopije iz postavki u aplikaciji.

howItWorks.title: How Chatforia Works
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed to make communication simple, fast, and accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using your email or username to create your Chatforia account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect with others by selecting contacts or starting new chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Messages are delivered quickly to provide a smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-in translation helps users communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Manage your preferences, contacts, and communication settings.

safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.

tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.

whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter More Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one of the most important tools for communication in today’s world. From personal conversations to business interactions, messaging apps allow people to stay connected instantly and efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely on messaging apps for daily communication with friends, family, and colleagues. Whether it's a quick update or a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient and flexible way to stay in touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships and collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus on giving users control over their data and conversations. Features like encryption, privacy settings, and message controls allow users to communicate with confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues to evolve with new features such as AI-powered responses, translation, and multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms will become even more powerful and versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built with these principles in mind, offering a fast, secure, and user-friendly messaging experience for a connected world.

global.title: The Future of Global Communication
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once required phone calls or in-person meetings can now be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues to advance, global communication is becoming faster, more accessible, and more inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One of the biggest changes in communication is the reduction of geographic barriers. People can now connect with others across the world in near real time. Whether for personal conversations, business, or collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far less limiting.
global.translationDesc: Language has traditionally been one of the biggest obstacles to global communication. Today, built-in translation tools help bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow users to communicate more easily even if they speak different languages, creating new opportunities for connection and understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed is a key factor shaping modern communication. Users expect messages to be delivered quickly, and modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables more natural and fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes more digital, privacy and security are increasingly important. Users want confidence that their conversations are protected. Features like encryption and user-controlled settings help support a more secure communication experience.
global.futureDesc: The future of global communication will likely include more advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved translation, and enhanced user experiences. As technology evolves, communication will continue to become more intuitive and accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia are part of this shift, helping people connect more easily across languages and borders.

index.title: Chatforia Blog
index.intro: Explore insights on communication, online safety, and how messaging technology is connecting people around the world.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: About Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia is a secure, multilingual messenger with end-to-end encryption, instant translation, and voice/video calling. Our mission is simple: help people connect—safely, privately, and across languages.

values.control: Control: Disappearing messages & read receipts are optional.
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages and read receipts are optional.

about.howDescription: Messages are encrypted on your device before they leave it. Translation, backups, and device sync are designed to minimize what our servers can see.
about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
about.controlDesc: Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: For media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is a privacy-first messaging app that makes cross-language chat effortless. Messages are end-to-end encrypted by default, and built-in translation supports 100+ languages in real time. Users can enable disappearing messages, keep read receipts optional, and sync across devices. Available on iOS, Android, and the web.
press.scanTip: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a private, global messenger launching on web, iOS, and Android. If you care about privacy, encryption, and delightful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How to apply: Use the button below to email your resume and links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Help build the foundation of a new global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, and Android.
• Work directly with the founder on architecture and product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of the stack: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the user base scales.

advertise.title: Oglašavajte se na Chatforiji
advertise.description: Dosezite angažirane korisnike poruka putem ukusnih, za brend siguran pozicija. Nudimo banner oglase na pozicijama visoke vidljivosti, sponzorstva, i interne promocije. Premium pretplatnici ne vide oglase.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Također poslužujemo inventar putem Google AdSensea. Možete ciljati Chatforia pomoću ID-a izdavača {{pubId}} ili koristiti obrazac ispod za direktna sponzorstva.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Također poslužujemo dio inventara putem Google AdSensea. Direktna sponzorstva su dostupna—koristite obrazac ispod.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Završavamo naš oglasni inventar. Recite nam o svojoj kampanji i mi ćemo vam preporučiti pozicije.

why.highSession: Visoka frekvencija sesija i vrijeme provedeno u chat UI
why.brandSafe: Formatima sigurnim za brend; pažljivo ograničavanje frekvencije
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponzorirani trenuci (npr. modalni prozor "Pokreni chat") dostupan
why.deals: Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Thanks—our team will reply by email.
contact.errorSend: Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Informacije koje prikupljamo
infoWeCollect.account: Informacije o računu (npr. e-pošta/telefon) za kreiranje i sigurnost vašeg računa.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: Ako odlučite navesti broj mobilnog telefona, koristimo ga za omogućavanje funkcija kao što su verifikacija računa, obavijesti o prijavi i slanje poruka između korisnika putem SMS-a gdje je podržano. Možemo slati transakcijske SMS poruke vezane za vaš račun i aktivnosti na Chatforiji. Možete se u bilo kojem trenutku odjaviti od primanja SMS poruka tako što ćete odgovoriti podržanom ključnom riječi za odjavu (kao što je "STOP") ili promijeniti postavke obavijesti u aplikaciji. Mi ne prodati vaš broj telefona ili ga koristiti za nepovezani marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Dodajte primaoca iznad da biste počeli…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Dijeljenje
sharing.body: Ne prodajemo lične podatke. Možemo dijeliti ograničene podatke sa obrađivačima (npr. push obavijesti, analitika) pod strogim ugovorima.

rights.title: Vaša prava
rights.body: U zavisnosti od vaše regije (npr. GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), možete zatražiti pristup, ispravku, brisanje ili odustajanje od određenih obrada. Kontakt: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Djeca
children.body: Chatforia nije namijenjena djeci mlađoj od 13 godina (ili kako to zahtijeva vaš lokalni zakon).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Korištenjem Chatforia slažete se s ovim Uslovima. Ako se ne slažete, nemojte koristiti uslugu.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Pravite tačne informacije i čuvajte podatke za prijavu na sigurnom.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Vi ste odgovorni za aktivnosti na vašem računu.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Bez nezakonitog, uvredljivog ili sadržaja koji krši prava; bez spama ili automatizirane zloupotrebe.

sms.title: SMS komunikacije
sms.body: Ako navedete broj mobilnog telefona, slažete se da vam Chatforia može slati SMS poruke u vezi sa vaš račun i korištenje usluge, kao što su obavijesti o prijavi, sigurnosne obavijesti i poruke vezane za razgovore koje pokrećete ili u kojima učestvujete. Ne koristimo SMS za promotivne ili marketinške poruke bez vaše izričite saglasnosti. Mogu se primjenjivati standardne tarife za poruke i podatke. Možete se odjaviti od primanja SMS poruka u bilo kojem trenutku tako što ćete odgovoriti podržanom ključnom riječi za odjavu (na primjer, "STOP") ili ažuriranjem postavki obavijesti u aplikaciji.

yourContent.title: Vaš sadržaj
yourContent.body: Zadržavate prava na svoj sadržaj. Dajete nam neophodna prava za rad usluge (npr. usmjeravanje, pohrana, prevođenje).

disclaimer.title: Odricanja od odgovornosti i odgovornost
disclaimer.body: Usluge se pružaju "takve kakve jesu" bez garancija. U najvećoj mjeri koju dopušta zakon, Chatforia nije odgovorna za indirektnu ili posljedičnu štetu.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: At Chatforia, we strive to provide a high-quality service to all users. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You may cancel at any time through your account settings or the platform used to purchase.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted for duplicate charges, billing errors, or technical issues preventing access to paid features. All requests are reviewed case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable
nonRefundable.body: We generally do not provide refunds for unused time, partial subscription periods, or failure to cancel before renewal.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Purchases
thirdParty.body: If purchased through third-party platforms such as the Apple App Store, refunds must be requested directly through those platforms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Ne prodajte niti dijelite moje lične podatke
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ne prodaje lične podatke. Stanovnici Kalifornije i dalje mogu podnijeti zahtjeve u skladu sa CPRA koristeći dugme ispod.

cookies.title: Podešavanja kolačića
cookies.body: Chatforia koristi minimalne kolačiće (npr. sesija, sigurnost). Ne koristimo kolačiće za oglase trećih strana. Upravljajte kolačićima putem postavki vašeg preglednika.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia šalje samo SMS poruke vezane za račun i razgovore na brojeve telefona koje je korisnik izričito naveo i na koje je pristao. Tipične poruke uključuju kodove za prijavu/verifikaciju, obavijesti o dostavi poruka, sigurnosne obavijesti i transakcijske ažuriranja računa.

optIn.title: Kako se korisnici prijavljuju
optIn.body: Korisnici se prijavljuju unosom svog broja telefona tokom registracije i potvrđivanjem polje za potvrdu SMS pristanka na stranici za registraciju ili na namjenskom

optOut.title: Kako se korisnici odjavljuju
optOut.stop: Odgovorite STOP na bilo koju Chatforia SMS poruku da biste se odjavili.
optOut.start: Odgovorite START da biste se ponovo pretplatili.

help.title: Pomoć
help.bodyPrefix: Odgovorite HELP za pomoć ili e-poštu

privacyTerms.title: Privatnost i uslovi
privacyTerms.bodyStart: Slaganjem na SMS, korisnici također pristaju na naše

sms.addRecipient: Dodajte primatelja iznad da biste započeli…
